title: Kelp Remover
body:
# THESE MODS ARE NOW UNSUPPORTED, I WILL NOT BE UPDATING THEM ANYMORE

Kelp was introduced in 1.13, causing numerous performance problems both server and client side, and it's only purpose was to bring a bit more life to the ocean. It's only "good" feature was it's use as food, even then it only heals the bare minimum of half a heart.

So, I decided to remove it completely with a mod, and after a bit of tweaking, the dreaded kelp is finally gone.

## Screenshots

![An ocean without Kelp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/381fc3456325e58ee1738ad1864efeedcfcd2282.jpeg)
![Another ocean without Kelp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2635465659b81e5df320df1a9ab5e93b3c43875e.jpeg)
